response.overview: In a small village in Thrissur... a boy who struggled even to eat chapati. No one thought that the boy who played on the ground without shoes would one day conquer the fields of the country... but he believed.  That boy - Vijayan  His feet started from the ground... then rose to the stadiums... defying all obstacles, he became the face of Indian football
response.title: ഐ എം വിജയൻ
